ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Deadline – 15 April
ham.body:
Dear Students,

This is a friendly reminder that the final semester project submission is due on **15 April 2026**. Please ensure that your project report and the accompanying presentation slides are uploaded to the course portal by 11:59 PM on the deadline day.

**Submission Checklist**
- Project report (PDF, max 10 MB)
- Slide deck (PowerPoint, max 5 MB)
- Source code archive (ZIP, max 20 MB)
- README file with build/run instructions

If you have any questions or need clarification on the requirements, feel free to drop by my office hours tomorrow (Mon‑Wed 2:00‑3:30 PM) or send me an email.

Thank you for your hard work this semester. Looking forward to reviewing your projects!

Best regards,

Prof. Elena Martinez
Department of Computer Science
University of Midtown

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Crypto Wallet has been Suspended – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued User,

We regret to inform you that **your CryptoWallet account (ID: 7X8C-9Z2K)** has been **suspended** due to suspicious activity detected on 12 April 2026. To restore access and prevent a permanent lock, you must complete the verification process within **24 hours**.

**What you need to do:**
1. Verify your identity by providing a copy of your government‑issued ID and a selfie.  
2. Confirm the recent transaction details shown in the attachment.  
3. Click the secure link below to upload the documents and complete the verification.

**Secure Verification Link:** <URL>

Failure to respond within the allotted time will result in a **permanent** suspension of your wallet, and any remaining funds will be frozen and inaccessible.

If you believe this is a mistake, please contact our support team immediately by replying to this email or calling 1‑800‑CRYPTO‑SEC. Do not ignore this message – your funds are at risk.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

CryptoWallet Security Team
